content: JavaFX CSS -fx-font-size set on root node cascades to all children that don't override it. Using root.setStyle('-fx-font-size: 14px') will change all labels, buttons, checkboxes etc. that inherit from default font. However, controls with explicit inline -fx-font-size styles (like title labels with 18px, 20px) will NOT be affected by the root style because inline styles have higher specificity. This means hardcoded inline font sizes in individual controls must be removed or changed to use relative sizing.
